details.test: Task 1: Open 5x isolated BTC long limit with TP/SL
Task 2: Short higher-volume BTC/ETH perpetual with 3x leverage and 200 USDT margin
Task 3: Create altcoin perpetuals watchlist using filters and favorites
Task 4: Open 10x SOL short with 300 USDT margin and close 50% via limit order
Task 5: Convert BTC position from cross to isolated 8x while keeping 100 USDT margin
Task 6: Open chart for most profitable recent derivatives trade
Task 7: Create BTC price alerts above 75k and below 60k (in-app)
Task 8: Use fee calculator for 10,000 USDT BTC trade at 5x and select cheaper order type
Task 9: Protect ETH long with stop-limit 5%/6% below current price
